description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named ansible-syntax-check in the lint stage, using the williamyeh/ansible:alpine3 Docker image and extending .base_ansible. The job is allowed to fail and runs a series of echo commands that print red warning symbols and a deprecation notice, then resets the terminal color, runs ansible-playbook --syntax-check *.yml, and finally executes false to force a failure. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
